name: Coffee Bean Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kahlúa or other coffee liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. For the frosting: In a saucepan, combine butter, cocoa powder, and milk. Bring to a boil. Stir in vanilla extract and powdered sugar until the frosting reaches the proper consistency.
3. For the brownies: In another saucepan, combine butter, shortening, coffee, and liqueur. Stir until combined. Let it cool slightly.
4. In a large mixing bowl, mix together the flour and granulated sugar. Pour the butter-shortening mixture over the dry ingredients in the bowl. Add buttermilk, eggs, baking soda, and vanilla extract. Mix well to combine.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 17 x 1-1/2 x 11-inch jelly roll pan. Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Frost the brownies immediately with the prepared frosting. Garnish with espresso beans if desired.
7. Allow the brownies to cool before cutting into bars and serving.
